message: Reminder to self: consistency beats intensity. I skipped 0 weeks of content in the last 52 weeks by batching on Sundays, using a 3-topic rotation, and scheduling 14 days ahead. Traffic grew 4 times, but more importantly, I met 7 partners across 3 projects. Small systems, big results. It also lowered stress by 30% because decisions were pre-made. If you're busy, start with 1 hour/week and build.

One underrated wealth move: negotiate vendor terms. On a $200,000 spend, moving from Net 15 to Net 45 improved cash conversion by 20 days and saved $3,300 in interest at 6% APR. It took 4 emails and 1 call. Ask politely, anchor with volume, and be ready to walk.

After 3 market cycles and 2 false starts, here's my rule: only invest in what I can explain to a teenager in 2 minutes. That criteria kept me out of 5 deals and in 3 that returned 18%, 22%, and 27%. Clarity compounds.
